title: National flu immunisation programme plan 2025 to 2026
body: "The annual flu letter for 2025 to 2026 describes the national flu immunisation programme and outlines which groups are eligible for flu vaccination.  Annual letters for previous years are available:   2024 to 2025 2023 to 2024 2022 to 2023 2021 to 2022 2017 to 2018, to 2020 to 2021  "
